headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on PulteGroup, Raises Price Target to $123
summary: Barclays  analyst Matthew Bouley   maintains PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $112 to $123.
